title: stachys harleyana
intro: Stachys harleyana, also known as Woundwort, is a perennial plant species native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, cuts, and minor infections. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as colds and bronchitis. Stachys harleyana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it's often used in herbal medicine to promote wound healing and support overall well-being.
